intro: Waves slam the shore. Paratroopers tear through the dark sky. Operation Overlord, the legendary airborne fight reborn on a brand-new battlefield.
description:
Powered by a fully upgraded next-gen 3D physics engine and all-new shaders applied across the entire game, this is a completely reimagined FPS experience. From the amphibious assault on the beaches of Normandy to the harrowing nighttime jumps of the airborne divisions, live through the full story of D-Day on one massive, overwhelming battlefield. A solo single-player FPS set against the backdrop of World War II that every military fan has been waiting for. Amid the thunder of gunfire and the haze of gunpowder smoke, the hero who changes history is you!

・Intense, gripping missions rooted in historical fact hit you one after another
・Massive content with dozens of episodes to fight your way through
・Clear key stages to unlock jaw-dropping cinematic cutscenes
・Collect and use a huge variety of weapons authentically used in World War II
・The latest 3D audio and 3D physics engine put you right in the action, where you can feel every artillery blast
・Next-gen shaders applied to fully redrawn environments and characters deliver stunning visual fidelity
・Immersive 3D effects and graphics that drop you straight into the chaos of a world at war
・Team up with AI-powered allied soldiers and crush the enemy together
・Use cover to your advantage in tense, realistic firefights that feel like the real thing
・Grab weapons from allies and enemies alike and unleash an unstoppable FPS experience
・Expanded weapon collection loaded with authentic historical firearms from World War II

From the beach assault at Normandy to paratroopers blazing through the night sky, the complete story of D-Day is packed into this one must-play game. Blast through iconic moments in history, clear every episode, and an unforgettable ending is waiting for you. Download now and become the hero history never forgets.

Synopsis
In 1944, the war had reached a critical breaking point.
The Soviet Union, hammered by devastating losses on the Eastern Front, was pushing the Allies hard to open a second front in Europe.
After learning hard lessons from the failed raid at Dieppe, Allied commanders gathered at the Casablanca Conference and committed to planning the largest military operation in history, codenamed Operation Overlord.

In the early hours of June 6th, before the first light of dawn.
Allied airborne forces dropped silently into the darkness over Normandy, tasked with taking out coastal gun batteries and locking down key bridges.
Then, as dawn broke, thousands of landing craft tore through the grey, churning sea, charging hard toward Omaha Beach.

"The hopes and prayers of liberty-loving people everywhere march with you.
The eyes of the world are upon you.
The hour of your great crusade has arrived."

Now, the battle that will change the course of history is about to begin.
